summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. All five open PRs are classified independently; no close, merge, label, comment, fix, or raise-PR action is planned.

actions.reason: Independent open draft PR with its own review path; no duplicate/superseded evidence and no shared canonical in this inventory shard.
Independent focused contributor PR awaiting normal maintainer review; failing check blocks any merge-style conclusion, but does not make it a closeout candidate.
Independent draft stacked refactor with unique scope and proof still requested; no duplicate/superseded evidence in hydrated items.
Independent open PR with a clear focused scope, but proof checks are failing; keep it on its own proof/review path instead of closing or escalating the whole shard.
Independent focused contributor PR with supplied proof and no hydrated duplicate/supersession evidence; leave for normal maintainer review because merge is not allowed in this job.
